title: Chef Aid Kitchen Shears - Heavy-Duty Design with Sturdy Stainless Steel Blades for Cutting of Poultry, Meat, and Vegetables. Built-in Nutcracker and Bottle Opener. Soft Grip Handles. Easy to Clean
features: HEAVY-DUTY DESIGN - Our Chef Aid Kitchen Shears and Scissors are built to handle tough kitchen tasks. With sturdy stainless steel blades, these shears can cut through poultry, meat, and vegetables with ease

MULTI-PURPOSE - These shears are designed to handle a variety of tasks in the kitchen. They are perfect for food preparation, including cutting herbs, vegetables, and snipping through meats. Also tasks such as cutting open packaging or trimming flowers

BUILT-IN NUTCRACKER - Our shears come with a built-in nutcracker, making it easy to crack open nuts of all sizes. No more struggling with traditional nutcrackers that can be difficult to use. Alternatively this can be used to open wines and Small lids
BOTTLE OPENER - In addition to the nutcracker, our shears also come with a built-in bottle opener. Perfect for opening your favourite beverage while cooking or entertaining
COMFORTABLE GRIP - The handles of our shears are designed for comfort, with a soft grip that makes them easy to hold and use for extended periods of time
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
